name: ShovelBear
short_description: Shovel Bear is a platform fighter with a focus on block breaking and EPIC power ups. Smack your adversaries with shovels, and survive as best you can. Can you dig it? O_o
detailed_description: Get ready for action packed battles with bears and SHOVELS. Shovel Bear is a platform fighter with unique power ups taking inspiration from video games and ANIME. The goal of the game is simple: smack, bop, dig, and stomp your enemy bear in a 1v1 to launch them off the map and prove yourself to be the best SHOVEL BEAR! Choose from 4 unique maps, with more in development. Enjoy a carefully crafted OST as you battle your friends and CPU's in the most unique platform fighter to date! This is the game you didn't ask for, but you TOTALLY NEED!
about_the_game: Get ready for action packed battles with bears and SHOVELS. Shovel Bear is a platform fighter with unique power ups taking inspiration from video games and ANIME. reviews.review_text: This was indeed a game. There were controls and graphics. But needs more bears and shovels.
it is good i like the sho9vel and the bear and when the bear kills the guy oit ius very good thanks

13.9/10
